Project Funding Support for Assoc. Prof. Dr. Oğuzhan Ceylan

It is our distinct pleasure to announce that the project applied for by Assoc. Prof. Oğuzhan Ceylan from the Department of MIS, as Coordinator, has been awarded funding for the Horizon Europe MSCA Staff Exchange Program.

Within the scope of the 48-month project titled “DIVERSE – Data-DrIVen Solutions for Efficient PoweR DiStribution Network OpErations” research aimed at developing an AI-powered framework for optimizing power distribution networks to support harmonious Renewable Energy Sources (RES) integration while addressing key challenges like variability and grid reconfiguration, into account will be conducted through staff mobility arranged among project partners.

The project team includes Prof. Dr. Aydoğan Özdemir, Prof. Dr. Timur Aydemir and Prof. Dr. Hasan Dağ.

We congratulate our professors and wish them success in their research.
